title: Friendica
description: Decentralized social network platform that federates with the Fediverse (ActivityPub), Mastodon, Diaspora and more.
installation: First boot auto-installs once MYSQL_* and FRIENDICA_URL/FRIENDICA_ADMIN_MAIL are set; the admin account is linked to FRIENDICA_ADMIN_MAIL (use the email you will register with). REQUIRED companion service: deploy a second container from the SAME image friendica:2026.05-apache but with the startup command set to /cron.sh - this is the Friendica worker/cron daemon that processes the federation queue and background jobs; without it nothing federates and the site stalls. The web and cron containers must share the same MariaDB add-on and the same persistent volume mounted at /var/www/html. Rotate the MariaDB password (default 'friendica') after first deploy. Outbound email is recommended (configure SMTP in the admin panel) for verification mails. The bundled Valkey add-on provides Redis-based locking/caching and is wired via REDIS_HOST. Configure your real public domain via FRIENDICA_URL (defaults to the assigned app URL).
